2605.07604.title: SAM 3D Animal: Promptable Animal 3D Reconstruction from Images in the Wild
2605.07604.paper_summary: 3D animal reconstruction in the wild remains challenging due to large species variation, frequent occlusions, and the prevalence of multi-animal scenes, while existing methods predominantly focus on single-animal settings. We present SAM 3D Animal, the first promptable framework for multi-animal 3D reconstruction from a single image. Built on the SMAL+ parametric animal model, our method jointly reconstructs multiple instances and supports flexible prompts in the form of keypoints and masks which enable more reliable disambiguation in crowded and occluded scenes. To train such a model, we further introduce Herd3D, a multi-animal 3D dataset containing over 5K images, designed to increase diversity in species, interactions, and occlusion patterns. Experiments on the Animal3D, APTv2, and Animal Kingdom datasets show that our framework achieves state-of-the-art results over both existing model-based and model-free methods, demonstrating a scalable and effective solution for prompt-driven animal 3D reconstruction in the wild.
2605.07604.paper_summary_zh: 3D動物重建在野外仍然具有挑戰性，這是因為物種變異大、經常出現遮擋，以及多動物場景的普遍存在，而現有的方法主要集中在單一動物的設定上。<lb/>我們提出了SAM 3D Animal，這是第一個可提示的多動物3D重建框架，能夠從單張圖像中進行重建。<lb/>基於SMAL+參數動物模型，我們的方法共同重建多個實例，並支持以關鍵點和遮罩的形式進行靈活提示，這使得在擁擠和遮擋場景中能夠更可靠地進行消歧。<lb/>為了訓練這樣的模型，我們進一步引入了Herd3D，一個包含超過5000張圖像的多動物3D數據集，旨在增加物種、互動和遮擋模式的多樣性。<lb/>在Animal3D、APTv2和Animal Kingdom數據集上的實驗表明，我們的框架在現有的基於模型和無模型的方法上都達到了最先進的結果，展示了一種可擴展且有效的解決方案，用於在野外進行提示驅動的動物3D重建。
2605.07604.author: Xuyi Hu et.al.
2605.07604.authors: Xuyi Hu, Jin Lyu, Jiuming Liu, Yebin Liu, Silvia Zuffi, Liang An, Stefan Goetz
